data.description: Core panel dataset — 150 countries × 4 years × 63 variables covering adoption, economics, policy, education, infrastructure, trust, equity, and research
520 granular AI policy events (laws, strategies, consultations) with status tracking and impact scoring
1,800 documented GenAI-related harms and incidents with severity, sector, tool, and resolution metadata
22,989 individual-level survey responses across 20 countries on GenAI usage frequency, trust, fear, and spending (2023–2025)
70 major GenAI model releases (2022–2025) with benchmark scores, parameter counts, and organizational metadata
Kaggle starter notebook — 10 analysis sections from EDA to ML classification
Full dataset documentation including methodology, column dictionary, and citation
